title: New Bounties Shake the Crew
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Coby, Unknown person #7, Buggy, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Crocodile as New bounties and the Cross Guild reshape the world after Wano, while the Straw Hats sail away from the closed country.
scene: New bounties and the Cross Guild reshape the world after Wano, while the Straw Hats sail away from the closed country.

dialogue.speaker: Coby
dialogue.text: Marines keep swarming the island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a nuisance, but I suppose I'll just have to relocate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This just shows that it would be beneficial for us to team up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Navy wouldn't take an organization headed by the two of us lightly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, they used to refer to you as "Marine Hunter!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You and I are the same...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We don't trust anyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Okay...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Eek!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Captain buggy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where are you goin'?! There's no reason to sweat over these marines, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it, I was about to make a break for it...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take a look! Their Warships are already under attack!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Their warships are what-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They keep sinking, one after another!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What?! What kind of hero is behind this?!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: It's crocodile, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess the rumors about him workin' under Chairman buggy are true!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Talk about inspiring loyalty!! He's risking himself just to save us from this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's our BUGG!!?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Oh, Crocodile's here, huh? Hehehe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Gya Haha Ha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Holy crap! He must be here because of all that cash I owe him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm broke! What should I do?! this is even worse than the Marines!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're still here? Knowing you, I figured you'd have bolted by now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He's not wrong!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know business at Buggy's delivery might look all hunky-Dory...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the truth is we've got too many mouths to feed! And all the giants, who were our top earners, just quit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you don't have any scratch on hand, I can always sell you into slavery.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't say stuff like that!! We're old prison buddies, remember?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: (ROCD-CHAN!)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I already did you a solid by agreeing to lend to you. If you can't pay me back now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...you will take full respond- sibility.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm about to form my own company, and I need the capital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oh C'mon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: T-Then... W-way not let me join?! You could acquire my company to help start yours!! It may not be much...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you'll get a former warlord serving you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll work twice as hard to pay off my debt! It's always good to be flashy and get the word out with a bang!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got all sorts of people that can help with that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Advertising experts, printers, couriers! You can work us to the bone for free!

summary: This part advances the Post-Wano World Shift through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
